title: What if someone else directed Evangelion
display_title: What if someone else directed Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What if someone else directed Evangelion?             Quote Post by Hazukari » Fri Jan 02, 2009 8:19 pm What if Stanley Kubrick made Evangelion raher than Anno, think about it

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 02, 2009 8:32 pm No. David Cronenberg. That would be more interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jan 02, 2009 9:46 pm In either (Cronenberg or Kubrick) case, I can't imagine the final product being TOO different (keyword being "too") on an aesthetic level. A lot of the interior background art in NGE has that cold, sterile feel common to both directors, and regarding Cronenberg in particular, some of the more phantasmagorical imagery has a techno-body-horror-ish vibe to it at times. Both would probably have a ball with all the different plot ambiguities. Now, on a thematic level- that's a different can of worms.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 02, 2009 10:50 pm I'd like Christopher Nolan to do it. It'd be badass.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jan 02, 2009 11:00 pm ^THIS

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Fri Jan 02, 2009 11:03 pm George Lucas for the epic fail version. It may be shiny, but it's also shit. Odd, how I know which director's to avoid, but seek none out in particular.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 02, 2009 11:08 pm Action_Bastard wrote: I'd like Christopher Nolan to do it. It'd be badass.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jan 02, 2009 11:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Either him, David Fincher, or David Lynch, preferably with H. R. Giger serving as Art Director.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Jan 03, 2009 12:27 am The Eva Monkey wrote: H. R. Giger serving as Art Director.

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Sat Jan 03, 2009 1:44 am Dartz wrote: George Lucas for the epic fail version. It may be shiny, but it's also shit. Odd, how I know which director's to avoid, but seek none out in particular.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Jan 03, 2009 2:11 am chee wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Either him, David Fincher, or David Lynch, preferably with H. R. Giger serving as Art Director.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 03, 2009 4:47 am Well in any case if Anno was not the director we would not have those lovely mind rape scenes we all know and love in Anno's depression inspired 24 and 25. We would not also have the ironic Komm, Susser Tod. EoE would probably not as epic. Actually it might be more different then we think. How about if M. Night Shamalan directed? [---gratuitous smiley misuse purged---] There would be more bloody plot holes. =_=

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 03, 2009 5:54 am Spoiler

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 03, 2009 5:56 am ZapalacX wrote: Spoiler

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 03, 2009 1:38 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: How about if M. Night Shamalan directed?

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Sat Jan 03, 2009 2:52 pm i'd vote for Tarantino... ... LoL!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 03, 2009 3:13 pm simon wrote: i'd vote for Tarantino...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 03, 2009 3:33 pm For fun how about Stephen Segal?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Jan 03, 2009 3:34 pm Uwe Boll.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat Jan 03, 2009 3:59 pm Uwe Boll.
